title: deparia auriculata var. zhongdianensis
intro: Deparia auriculata var. zhongdianensis, also known as Zhongdian Deparia, is a variety of the Deparia auriculata fern, a species of flowering plant in the family Athyriaceae. This plant is used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Deparia auriculata var. zhongdianensis include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and treating various respiratory and gastrointestinal issues. Deparia auriculata var. zhongdianensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat colds, fever, and digestive problems.
